title: Arcane Horizons
description: Feels just like that, but... different. New. Better?
body:
"This is just an Alpha version, so expect things to be... a bit unstable, magical glitches included."

Ever felt that nostalgic spark? Well, this feels almost like that. Familiar aura, recognizable artifacts, and yet… something’s different. This isn’t just a remake—it’s a reimagining. The core idea remains, but with new twists, refined features, and a sprinkle of fresh enchantment.

Think of it as an old magical tome, rewritten with clearer runes and new discoveries. It’s far from complete, but hey—every great spell starts with a draft, right?
